action_def.COMMENT: name definition of for an action

action_parameter_def_x.COMMENT: relates a parameter definition (parameter_def) with an action definition (action_def)

actor.COMMENT: references a person, organization and/or systemtool; can be a combination of the three

actor_pref.COMMENT: general container for actor-related preferences in key/value form

bom.COMMENT: bill of material (bom) container associated with an experiment

bom_material.COMMENT: [singleton and parent] materials from inventory table, defined in material/material_composite tables

bom_material_composite.COMMENT: composite materials associated with bom_material as defined in material_composite table

calculation_def.COMMENT: calculation specification: can refer to systemtool, executable or postgres operation

calculation_eval.COMMENT: reserved for future use: when calculation might be more like a state-machine

calculation_parameter_def_x.COMMENT: cross table for joining calculation_def and parameter_def

calculation_stack.COMMENT: temporary stack to push and pop values for a calculation; not currently used

condition.COMMENT: workflow object of evaluated expression (calculation) and used as branch to one or more objects

condition_calculation_def_x.COMMENT: cross table for joining condition_def and calculation_def

condition_path.COMMENT: routing connector (for a condition instance) to other workflow objects

edocument.COMMENT: container of all general files (edocuments); stored as blob

edocument_x.COMMENT: cross table to join an edocument to any other entity row

material_composite.COMMENT: materials that are components of composites (chemical or labware)

material_x.COMMENT: cross table join a material to another entity row

material_refname.COMMENT: alternative standard reference name for a material

material_refname_def.COMMENT: material reference name standards (e.g. SMILES, InChI,

material_refname_x.COMMENT: cross table of material and refname

material_type_x.COMMENT: cross table for material and material_type

measure.COMMENT: instantiation of a measure (observable); can be associated with any entity

measure_def.COMMENT: definition of a measure (name, property def, default value

measure_x.COMMENT: cross table for measure and associated entity row

note.COMMENT: note text; can be associate to any entity

note_x.COMMENT: cross table for note and associated entity row

organization.COMMENT: organization information for person and system tool; can be component of actor

parameter.COMMENT: instantiation of a parameter (input to a calculation)

parameter_x.COMMENT: cross table for parameter and associated entity

property.COMMENT: instantiation of property; characterization and measure of a material

property_def.COMMENT: property definition; characterization and measure of a material

property_x.COMMENT: cross table for property and associated entity

status.COMMENT: description of status for association to any entity (row); each entity has FK to status

sys_audit.COMMENT: system table for auditing all targeted table activities

tag.COMMENT: tag (short text) that can be associated with any entity (row)

tag_x.COMMENT: cross table for tag and associated entity (row)

type_def.COMMENT: categorization of value (val) types; this is required as part of val

udf.COMMENT: instantiation of a user defined field (udf)

udf_x.COMMENT: cross table for udf and associated entity (row)

workflow_action_set.COMMENT: definition of an action set (same) actions operating over a variety of parameters and/or materials

workflow_object.COMMENT: abstracted workflow objects (currently action and condition); e.g. the rectangles and diamonds in a workflow diagram

workflow_state.COMMENT: collection of workflow states; not currently used

workflow_step.COMMENT: designation of workflow_object paths or connections; i.e. the paths between objects in a workflow diagram
